title: Abacus AI Just Dropped AI SuperComputer With Claude And Gemini
summary: Abacus AI launched AI SuperComputer, an always-on cloud environment where AI agents can build, deploy, host, and run software. The platform integrates with Claude and Gemini, offering database access, storage, terminal access, SSH, GitHub, AWS integration, and one-click HTTPS deployment to enable agents to move from code generation to live production deployment.
